title: Telemetry, Latency, Capacity, Cache Effectiveness, and Fair-Use Operations · Runtime Contract: Pokedex Go Bounded Metrics
summary: Logs contain full URLs and bodies, metrics use Pokemon names as labels, average latency hides stalls, cache hit rate lacks workload context, and optimization increases API traffic. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
